title: The Home Garden: Pittsburgh
subtitle: HORT E-15 · A 3-week intensive
description: Everything a Pittsburgh homeowner needs to build and keep a healthy garden: reading your site and clay soil, choosing and caring for plants in Zone 6b, winning the war on weeds, and running a year-round maintenance system, taught through daily lectures, field labs, quizzes, and hands-on projects you can do in any season.

lessons.title: Days 1–7: Site, Soil, Water, and How Plants Live
Days 8–14: Choosing, Planting, Feeding, Pruning, Protecting
Days 15–21: Weeds, Lawn, Design, and the Seasonal Calendar
